verses.text: Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kha thumna a ni masa ni-in amaute Sinai sehnel gam tung uh hi
Refidim panin amaute ding khia-in Sinai gam a tun' uh ciangin, amaute in sehnel gam tua mual mai-ah giahphual a sat uh hi
Pasian kiangah Moses paito hi. Topa in mual panin amah sam a, “Jakob' suanlekhak Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi
Egypt mite tungah ka bawlna leh muvanlai in a kha tawh a note a puak bangin note hong pua-in keima kiangah kong paipihna na mu khin uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in ka thu mangin ka thuciamna na zuih uh leh mite khempeuh lak panin note pen keima mi na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuh keima-a' hi a
note pen keima siampi nasep a sem minam, leh minam siangtho na hi ding uh hi. Israel mite tungah hih thute na gen ding ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses hong pai-in upate sam a, Topa in amah a thupiak hih thute khempeuh amaute' mai-ah a sung hi
Mi khempeuh in, “ Topa' gensa khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” ci-in dawng khawm uh hi. Moses in mite' thugente Topa' tungah a gen hi

Topa in Moses tungah, “En in, nang kong hopih ciangin mite in a zak theihna ding leh nang zong hong up theihna dingun meii sahpi sungah nang kiangah kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses in mite' thugente Topa' tungah a gen hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite kiangah pai in la, tuni leh zingciang sungteng amaute siangtho sakin, amau' puante amau mah sawpsakin
a ni thum ni-in a baihsa-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni thum ni-in Sinai Mual tungah mite khempeuh' muhna-ah Topa hong paisuk ding hi
Nangmah in mite-a' dingin dalna khat a kimkotah na koih ding a, ‘Mualtungah pailoin, a gamgi na lawn'khak lohna dingun kidawm un; mual a lawng peuhpeuh kithat ding hi

Khut peuhmah in tua mi kithat dingpa lawngkhalo ding a, suang tawh kidenglum ahih kei leh kikaplum ding hi. Ganhing hita leh mihing hita leh kihing khawilo ding hi,’ na ci ding hi. Peengkul sauveipi hong kitum ciangin amaute mualtungah hong paito ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin mualtung panin mite kiangah Moses paisuk a, mite siangthosak hi. Amaute in a puante uh sawp uh hi
Amah in mite kiangah, “Ni thum ni ciangin a baihsa-in om un; numei tawh lumkhawm kei un,” a ci hi
A ni thum ni zingsang ciangin van gingin khua phia a, mualtungah meii sahpi kai a, nakpi takin a ging peengkul kitum ahih manin giahphuala om mi khempeuh ling uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in giahphual panin Pasian a dawn dingin mite paikhiatpih a, amaute a omna ding mual bulah om uh hi
Meikhu in Sinai Mual tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei sung tua mualtungah Topa a kumsuk hi. A khu, meiphualpi khu bangin kahto a, a mual buppi nakpi takin kiling hi
Peengkul aw a nak gin' semsem laitakin Moses pau a, Pasian in vanging sungah amah dawng hi
Sinai Mual dawnah Topa hong paisuk hi. Topa in tua mual dawnah Moses sam a, Moses zong paito hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute in Topa a en dingin hong kantanin amaute tampi tak si khading uh ahih manin paisuk in la, mite hilhkhol in
Amaute' tungah Topa hehlua khading ahih manin, Topa' kiangah hong pai siampite zong amau mah kisiangthosak tawm hen,” a ci hi
Moses in Topa' tungah, “Sinai Mual dongah mite hong pai theilo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmahmah in kote nong thuhilh a, ‘Mual kimkotah dalnate bawl in la, siangthosak in,’ nong ci hi,” a ci hi
Topa in ama kiangah, “Paisuk in la, Aaron hong paipihto in. Ahih hangin amaute' tungah amah hehlua khading ahih manin Topa kiang dongah a pai dingin siampite leh mite paisuak sak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite kiangah Moses paisukin amaute kiangah a gen hi.
